employers.name: Aurora Tech Labs
employers.description: Aurora Tech Labs is a fast-growing software company building cloud-native platforms for data-intensive applications. The company partners with enterprises to modernize their engineering practices and deliver scalable, secure solutions.

employers.name: Midwest Health Network
employers.description: Midwest Health Network is a regional healthcare provider operating hospitals, clinics, and long-term care facilities across the Chicago area, focused on patient-centered care and clinical excellence.

employers.name: Blue Sky Marketing Group
employers.description: Blue Sky Marketing Group is a full-service marketing agency specializing in digital campaigns, brand strategy, and performance marketing for B2C and B2B clients nationwide.

employers.name: Pacific Support Solutions
employers.description: Pacific Support Solutions provides outsourced customer support and contact center services for technology, ecommerce, and financial services companies, with a focus on high-quality, omnichannel support.

employers.name: Brightline Design Studio
employers.description: Brightline Design Studio is a UX and product design consultancy that partners with startups and enterprises to deliver user-centered digital experiences across web and mobile platforms.

employers.name: Insight Data Analytics
employers.description: Insight Data Analytics helps organizations unlock value from their data through advanced analytics, business intelligence, and data science consulting, with a distributed, remote-first team across the United States.

jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer
jobs.description: Aurora Tech Labs is seeking a Senior Software Engineer to lead the design and implementation of scalable microservices powering our cloud-native data platform.
jobs.responsibilities: Design and build distributed services in a cloud environment; collaborate with product and data teams to ship features; own end-to-end delivery from design to production monitoring; mentor junior engineers and participate in code reviews.
jobs.qualifications: 7+ years of experience in software engineering; strong expertise in at least one modern language such as Go, Java, or TypeScript; experience with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure); familiarity with microservices, Docker, and Kubernetes.
jobs.schedule_details: Monday–Friday, core hours 10am–4pm PT with flexible start and end times.
jobs.benefits_summary: Comprehensive health coverage, 401(k) with match, equity grants, 20 days PTO, paid parental leave, annual learning stipend.
jobs.remote_tagline: Remote / Hybrid from SF Bay Area

jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, Data Platform
jobs.description: Join the core data platform team to build highly available services that process billions of events per day.
jobs.responsibilities: Implement high-throughput data pipelines; optimize services for performance and reliability; contribute to architectural decisions; participate in on-call rotation.
jobs.qualifications: 5+ years in backend engineering; experience with streaming technologies (Kafka, Pub/Sub); strong SQL and data modeling skills; prior experience in SaaS or data platform environments.
jobs.schedule_details: Monday–Friday, approx. 9am–5:30pm PT.
jobs.benefits_summary: Medical, dental, vision, 401(k), stock options, commuter benefits, wellness stipend.

jobs.title: Senior Full Stack Software Engineer
jobs.description: Aurora Tech Labs is hiring a Senior Full Stack Engineer to build intuitive, performant user experiences for our analytics customers.
jobs.responsibilities: Develop web applications using React and Node.js; collaborate closely with designers and PMs; improve frontend performance and reliability; contribute to design systems and UI patterns.
jobs.qualifications: 6+ years of full stack development experience; strong JavaScript/TypeScript skills; experience with modern frontend frameworks; familiarity with REST and GraphQL APIs.
jobs.schedule_details: Flexible schedule with overlap of 4 hours with Pacific Time business hours.
jobs.benefits_summary: Remote-first culture, health coverage, home office stipend, 20 days PTO, company retreats.

jobs.title: Marketing Manager
jobs.description: Blue Sky Marketing Group is looking for a Marketing Manager to oversee integrated campaigns for key Midwest clients.
jobs.responsibilities: Lead the planning and execution of multichannel campaigns; manage a small team of coordinators; analyze campaign performance and optimize spend; present results to clients.
jobs.qualifications: 4+ years of marketing experience; proven track record managing campaigns and budgets; strong communication and client-facing skills.
jobs.schedule_details: Monday–Friday, 9am–5:30pm CT with occasional evening events.
jobs.benefits_summary: Health, dental, vision, 401(k) with match, 15 days PTO, summer Fridays, transit benefits.

jobs.title: Senior Marketing Manager
jobs.description: Blue Sky Marketing Group seeks a Senior Marketing Manager to drive strategy for national accounts and mentor a growing team.
jobs.responsibilities: Own marketing strategy for key accounts; coordinate digital, social, and offline activations; guide a team of marketers; manage agency and vendor relationships.
jobs.qualifications: 6+ years of marketing experience; experience leading cross-functional teams; comfort presenting to executive stakeholders.
jobs.schedule_details: Hybrid schedule with 3 days per week in the Chicago office.
jobs.benefits_summary: Comprehensive benefits, 20 days PTO, paid volunteer days, professional development budget.
jobs.parking_details: Subsidized parking available in nearby garage.

jobs.title: Data Analyst
jobs.description: Insight Data Analytics is hiring a Data Analyst to support client engagements with dashboards, reports, and ad hoc analysis.
jobs.responsibilities: Translate business questions into analyses; build dashboards in BI tools; validate data quality; present insights and recommendations to stakeholders.
jobs.qualifications: 3+ years of experience in analytics; proficiency with SQL and a BI tool (Looker, Tableau, or Power BI); strong communication skills.
jobs.schedule_details: Standard US business hours with some flexibility.
jobs.benefits_summary: Remote-first team, health benefits, home office stipend, 18 days PTO plus company holidays.

jobs.title: Customer Support Representative (Entry Level)
jobs.description: Pacific Support Solutions is hiring an entry-level Customer Support Representative to assist customers by phone, email, and chat.
jobs.responsibilities: Respond to inbound customer inquiries; document interactions in the CRM; troubleshoot common issues; escalate complex cases to senior agents.
jobs.qualifications: Strong communication skills; basic computer proficiency; prior customer service experience is a plus but not required.
jobs.schedule_details: Monday–Friday, 8:30am–5pm CT, occasional overtime during peak periods.
jobs.benefits_summary: Health insurance, paid training, performance bonuses, 10 days PTO.
jobs.parking_details: Free on-site parking for all employees.

jobs.title: Senior UX Designer (Contract)
jobs.description: Brightline Design Studio is seeking a Senior UX Designer on a contract basis to support a fintech client redesigning their web platform.
jobs.responsibilities: Lead discovery workshops; create user flows, wireframes, and prototypes; collaborate with client stakeholders and developers; conduct usability testing.
jobs.qualifications: 5+ years of UX experience; strong portfolio demonstrating complex web and mobile projects; experience with Figma or similar tools.
jobs.schedule_details: 3–4 days per week, primarily during Pacific Time business hours; mix of remote and on-site client meetings in Seattle.
jobs.benefits_summary: Contract role; no formal benefits; eligible for project completion bonus.
jobs.remote_tagline: Hybrid contract within 25 miles of Seattle

jobs.title: UX Designer (Contract)
jobs.description: Contract UX Designer to support enterprise dashboard design for a cloud services client based in Bellevue.
jobs.responsibilities: Design responsive interfaces; collaborate with product and engineering; contribute to design system components; present design rationale to stakeholders.
jobs.qualifications: 3+ years of UX or product design; experience with B2B SaaS products; proficiency with modern design tools.
jobs.schedule_details: On-site in Bellevue 3 days per week; standard business hours.
jobs.benefits_summary: Contract position; optional access to coworking space.

jobs.title: UX Designer – E-commerce (Contract)
jobs.description: Brightline Design Studio is hiring a contract UX Designer to work on an e-commerce redesign for a retail client in Tacoma.
jobs.responsibilities: Conduct user research; create wireframes and high-fidelity designs; collaborate with developers to ensure design quality at implementation.
jobs.qualifications: 2+ years of UX or product design; experience with e-commerce flows; understanding of responsive design.
jobs.schedule_details: Approx. 3 days/week with flexible hours; occasional on-site workshops in Tacoma.
jobs.benefits_summary: Contract role; eligible for extension based on performance.
jobs.remote_tagline: Hybrid within driving distance of Tacoma

jobs.title: Retail Associate – Weekends Only
jobs.description: Retail Associate needed for a busy Miami storefront, focusing on weekend customer service and merchandising.
jobs.responsibilities: Greet customers and assist with product selection; process transactions; restock shelves; maintain a clean and organized store environment.
jobs.qualifications: Customer service experience preferred; ability to stand for extended periods; availability on Saturdays and Sundays.
jobs.schedule_details: Saturday and Sunday shifts between 9am–9pm, 16–20 hours per week.
jobs.benefits_summary: Employee discount, flexible scheduling, paid training.
jobs.parking_details: Employee parking available behind the store.

jobs.title: Part-Time Retail Associate (Weekend Shifts)
jobs.description: Join our Miami retail team to support weekend operations, focusing on checkout, stocking, and customer questions.
jobs.responsibilities: Operate POS system; handle returns and exchanges; assist with inventory counts; ensure excellent customer experiences.
jobs.qualifications: Prior retail or hospitality experience a plus; strong communication and basic math skills; must be available every weekend.
jobs.schedule_details: Saturday and Sunday, 10am–6pm, with occasional Friday evening shifts.
jobs.benefits_summary: Store discount, paid sick time (where applicable), opportunities for additional weekday shifts.

jobs.title: Weekend Retail Sales Associate
jobs.description: Weekend Sales Associate role in a high-traffic Miami retail location, focused on sales and upselling.
jobs.responsibilities: Engage customers, demonstrate products, upsell accessories, maintain merchandising standards, and assist with store opening/closing.
jobs.qualifications: Strong people skills; previous sales experience helpful; comfortable working in a fast-paced environment.
jobs.schedule_details: Saturday and Sunday, rotating shifts between 10am–10pm.
jobs.benefits_summary: Competitive hourly pay, commission on upsells, employee discount.
jobs.parking_details: Shared parking lot with partial reimbursement.

jobs.title: Nursing Assistant
jobs.description: Midwest Health Network is seeking a Nursing Assistant for a downtown Chicago facility near ZIP code 60601.
jobs.responsibilities: Provide direct patient care under the supervision of RNs; assist with activities of daily living; document patient information; support a safe and clean environment.
jobs.qualifications: Certified Nursing Assistant (CNA) in Illinois; BLS certification; prior experience in a hospital or long-term care setting preferred.
jobs.schedule_details: 12-hour rotating day and night shifts, including some weekends and holidays.
jobs.benefits_summary: Health, dental, vision, retirement plan, tuition reimbursement, 12 days PTO.
jobs.remote_tagline: On-site hospital role near downtown Chicago

jobs.title: Nursing Assistant – Medical Surgical Unit
jobs.description: Nursing Assistant position at a Chicago med-surg unit within 15 miles of ZIP 60601, offering on-site parking.
jobs.responsibilities: Assist nursing staff with patient care; take and record vital signs; transport patients; maintain unit cleanliness and safety.
jobs.qualifications: Active CNA certification in Illinois; ability to work rotating shifts; strong interpersonal skills.
jobs.schedule_details: Three 12-hour shifts per week, including some weekends and nights.
jobs.benefits_summary: Comprehensive health benefits, retirement plan, 14 days PTO, wellness programs, on-site cafeteria.
jobs.parking_details: Free on-site parking for all shifts.

jobs.title: Project Manager
jobs.description: Aurora Tech Labs is hiring a Project Manager to oversee cross-functional delivery of enterprise software implementations.
jobs.responsibilities: Plan and manage project timelines and scope; coordinate work across engineering, design, and customer teams; manage risks and issues; report status to stakeholders.
jobs.qualifications: 5+ years of project management experience; experience with software or SaaS projects; PMP or similar certification a plus.
jobs.schedule_details: Hybrid role with 2–3 days per week in the Boston office.
jobs.benefits_summary: Health, dental, vision, 401(k), 18 days PTO, performance bonus.

jobs.title: IT Project Manager
jobs.description: Blue Sky Marketing Group is seeking an IT Project Manager to coordinate marketing technology implementations for enterprise clients.
jobs.responsibilities: Lead project planning; manage vendor and internal resources; implement MarTech tools; ensure on-time, on-budget delivery.
jobs.qualifications: 3+ years in IT or digital project management; experience with marketing technology stacks; strong stakeholder management skills.
jobs.schedule_details: On-site in Boston, Monday–Friday, 9am–5:30pm ET.
jobs.benefits_summary: Medical, dental, vision, 401(k), 17 days PTO, commuter benefits.
jobs.parking_details: Discounted parking available in nearby lot.

jobs.title: Senior Product Manager
jobs.description: Aurora Tech Labs is hiring a Senior Product Manager to lead the roadmap for our flagship cloud analytics platform.
jobs.responsibilities: Define product vision and strategy; prioritize roadmap; work closely with engineering and design; gather customer feedback; drive product launches.
jobs.qualifications: 5+ years in product management; experience with B2B SaaS; strong analytical and communication skills; familiarity with data or analytics products is a plus.
jobs.schedule_details: Remote-first with optional travel to SF HQ; standard US business hours.
jobs.benefits_summary: Equity, comprehensive health benefits, 20 days PTO, remote work stipend.

jobs.title: Product Manager – Platform
jobs.description: Join the platform product team to define and deliver core capabilities used by multiple Aurora Tech Labs products.
jobs.responsibilities: Own the platform backlog; define requirements; align internal stakeholder needs; monitor metrics and iterate on features.
jobs.qualifications: 3+ years of product management; experience with APIs or platform products; comfort working with technical teams.
jobs.schedule_details: Fully remote across US time zones.
jobs.benefits_summary: Health, 401(k), home office stipend, 18 days PTO, annual company retreat.

jobs.title: Product Manager – Operations Tools
jobs.description: Insight Data Analytics is looking for a Product Manager to build internal and client-facing tools that streamline data operations.
jobs.responsibilities: Gather requirements from internal stakeholders; prioritize features; work with engineering to deliver tools that improve operational efficiency.
jobs.qualifications: 3+ years as a product manager or business analyst; familiarity with data workflows; strong problem-solving skills.
jobs.schedule_details: Remote-first with optional travel for quarterly planning sessions.
jobs.benefits_summary: Remote work, health and dental, 17 days PTO, flexible schedule.
